servers.description: MIRAGE multimodal retinal OCT/SLO foundation model. Tools: extract_features, reconstruct_oct, segment_layers, health.
LO-VLM BLIP-based OCT layer-level captioner. Tools: caption_oct, health.

infra_cost.comment: Per-second compute rates for MCP-call cost. Modal GPU rates captured 2026-06; multiply by region (1.25-2.5x)/non-preemption (3x) as needed. Horizon has no public per-second rate ('pay only for compute you use') - set horizon_rate_per_s from your plan.
